name: Robert Peters
bio: Robert Peters is listed as a Democratic candidate for Illinois' 2nd Congressional District in 2026. He serves in the Illinois Senate and entered the open-seat primary after Robin Kelly pursued a Senate bid. (Source: Shaw Local candidate list, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)

jacket.note: FEC candidate totals pending ETL import.
